So it's my first time playing this game because my friend plays it. And then the first 10 minutes I see this 8 year old named Alyssagt, saying "if you don't do this and that then you will get banned" so I said ok, and went to change my name. So I did and then he/she, pulled out the stick and said "I could ban you" so I said " okay cool" and they said "oh that's cool right" and I said yeah. Then they went over to the board and reported me for absolutely no reason and cursed me out saying "f u b****" and then I got banned. So please get rid of this little 3 year old who thinks they are all that. But otherwise the game is ok
